top_signals.title: Dollar Rally Builds as Hawkish Fed Meeting Stokes Rate-Hike Bets
top_signals.summary: The dollar extended its rally for a second day, pushing it back toward the late-March peak, as traders piled into bets that the Federal Reserve will start raising interest rates as soon as late next month.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bank of England keeps rates steady as it assesses Iran truce - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Bank of England keeps rates steady as it assesses Iran truce  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Ledn adds Tether Gold as loan collateral, expanding Bitcoin-backed lending model
top_signals.summary: Ledn’s addition of Tether Gold lending comes as tokenized commodities expand, with the sector accounting for nearly 17% of the $43 billion RWA market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Kraken integrates Solana DEX trading into core app, with support for additional networks planned
top_signals.summary: Kraken launches onchain DEX trading to give customers access to thousands of tokens across the Solana ecosystem.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
